textByHash.cca7baf1103d77633dd963a9c754404a53f5bca2: Welcome to my store, human! Are you interested in buying anything?
textByHash.993dec92bd82d8f19bf4ddab579077de983867e0: Boots, you say? What kind of boots?
textByHash.f6cf4b576af6af971f8873e28736375a341a8aba: Hmm, let's see... Well, I've got this pair of very exclusive boots. They're not armoured, but they look nice.
textByHash.0496fdaa80338d7b4bfe4cdf29224166d27cee6f: Or rather, I had. I'm afraid I sold them, come to think of it.
textByHash.663980fbb55130481eef68696d6e3a641f13d82a: I don't normally stock boots, no, nothing that's appropriate for... what did you say? A king?
textByHash.fc816f3016b3b96657abcbc4d464b10d1585adae: Old chap here in the west part of town, his name is Dromund. He's quite well known, not only for his wealth, but also for his... pecularities.
textByHash.2a7b7eca0ea41370d6a65a0dabc56b1b74248165: Go out the door, and head north. You'll have the headquarters of the Black Guard on your left and the bank on your right. Keep heading north and you'll find Dromund's house on your right. Can't miss it!
textByHash.39e77d41febc8f908526f5353da971fe04ec7f67: And if you're going to try to get the boots off him, good luck. You'll need it.
textByHash.485c1af882cef7a21f58a4d4b10e1383b674c3e1: I thought I already told you where to get them?
textByHash.6a6f172c5a989e20c1750232552b67204931a0c5: Say, would you be interested in doing a little task for me?
textByHash.4e4d3384e1c145249f20e45a940f620b76e4f5f9: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 3 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHash.92f935734758971fb2b732d2e9efe6965a29cd57: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 4 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHash.904e58b66d778f083438ecbbc33c0c17254be0e5: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 5 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHash.f3e65f28e390734c23856faddae33baa5a501f1c: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 3 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHash.eaa76f5a389473378bb5e0d58e1484288d1f6f40: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 4 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHash.74a107df820bea7d1db8d7728269f321560e58fc: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 5 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHash.bd4ee15f2ef8ab5e76f8d0072f605a33d3ee98bd: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 3 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHash.f8558bf1edd21ece0b12d1304eef01071620616f: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 4 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHash.841a0dcb11ebc5469bc8e3230d4f4540540fac5c: A special client has a little request for me. I will need 5 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHash.eb9321bcd1045441936d1afbe51b06726ad31072: That's really unfortunate. I hope I can find someone else.
textByHash.0abcdaeae5fe8eb4e19000c20f91d600d6bb1e76: I'm running a low on raw supplies at the moment. In the next minutes, I need item. Sounds agreeable?
textByHash.de406a7e4657570e467a7dd1c64d7dc7132c44f7: How are you doing getting me my item?
textByHash.5999523f0dbc2a9150fba7abcf834dded15605fd: Next time, can you decide on that in advance?
textByHash.6ee69872560bdbc67b407c030da1a3ec29ea08dd: You've put me in a spot of trouble now. I suppose I'll find a way out though.
textByHash.c3e2975be9df52631819ef7982875808001675c5: Great, now the minutes are up and you didn't get me item.
textByHash.ca1e44617b15969df1d9792b5524e7b888f2bc67: Do you want me to pay you in gold or do you want me to show you how to fight properly in these?
textByHash.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHash.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
